reviews.title: Ok not good so far
reviews.body: Ok not good so far.  Managed to set up joint account on line, then had to wait for paperwork to be sent via post, completed this then waited again for confirmation.  Now need a telephone password, which I had to wait for by post.  By the time it arrived it had expired outside the 10 day issue period!  Getting absolutely no where fast here and now being told to fill in another form and post it off and to wait again for a new code.  This is ridiculous. Have sine phoned customer services who are posting more codes out. Hopefully they will arrive before the 10 days period  or I will be back jo square one!

reviews.title: COMPLETE LACK OF COVENTRY INTEREST!!!!!
reviews.body: I have a number of savings accounts which I view via the CBS APP. I'm looking to place some money into an easy/restricted access account. The applicable interest rate for each is not shown as all have a zero balance at present. I therefore cannot make a comparison of products internally or externally. I'm not going to trawl through T&C's to find out the rate of interest or place funds in each one which would presumably trigger this information? The only other alternative would be to phone a customer service representative and glean the information verbally - absolutely pathetic!!!!

reviews.title: All good until you want to move your…
reviews.body: All good until you want to move your money away. Then, you are told a charge, only to be informed by an agent that there is no charge on Wednesday 9th of November, and then you receive a letter stating a charge of £14.74. Called, then got cut off, called again to be told the charge stands.  Which is fine, but the time and stress caused by this £14.74 charge is ridiculous!  I've lost 2.5 hours, which is £85 in my business! Maybe I should invoice you for your incompetence.  No doubt just delaying to get extra interest before the Bank of England drops the rates! Hopefully Ann Marie will save the day.Here's an idea - send a secure message to my banking online asking people to agree the charge - we click something to agree, send a secure message back - job done! Instead ,a month of wasted time and interest going back and forth!I won't be using CBS again, as you need to sort your shizz out.

reviews.title: Kelly's wonderful customer service
reviews.body: My wife and I visited the Milton Keynes branch last Saturday morning to open a new bond account and to transfer monies from another account, something we'd always rather do in the branch, rather than online.We were attended to by Kelly, who's patience, courtesy, product knowledge and professionalism were second to none.

reviews.title: Good building society but their IT side…
reviews.body: Good building society but their IT side of things is draconian. Registering to access online , tedious and drawn out. All looks ok but when prof of ID required the initializing camera part just fails. Wasted nearly 2 hours. Phoned in and no help there. Just poor and out of date.

reviews.title: Excellent society
reviews.body: Due to changing personal circumstances, I just had to close my savings account. However, I have had exceptional service from Coventry. Not only was the interest rate highly competitive but the online services were very navigable. When I needed to speak in person, my call was answered quickly and the staff could not have been more helpful.I am sorry to have to leave. I couldn't recommend them more highly and would like to express my heartfelt gratitude for the help, friendliness, consistency and professionalism I always had

reviews.title: Extremely fast and excellent customer…
reviews.body: I was having an issue changing some details on my account, and was fully expecting to have to hang on the phone for ages before being passed from person to person, like usual with bank call centres. However, I got through to the advisor (Kirsty) straight away (under 30 seconds), who was extremely helpful with my very complicated problem. I then was able to make the change via sending an online message through my online account, and received a response and action within 20 minutes (by Chelsea). I never write reviews, but was moved to by the absolutely amazing customer service I received. Thank you Coventry!

reviews.title: Proper old fashioned customer service
reviews.body: Great experience this week at the Shirley Branch. My Aunty (86) needed to sort out her accounts as her husband has dementia and money is now needed to be split to pay for care costs. The staff were really caring gave her plenty of time to explain things and to complete the paperwork needed. They even provided a special pen grip to help her with completing her signature as she has very bad arthritis in her hands. Everything that needed to be done was done in the one visit.

reviews.title: Not even one star.
reviews.body: Not even one star.Re: a product switch and transfer of equity.I have spent half an hour on the phone while a customs service advisor was trying to find out whether or not The Coventry had received a payslip I had emailed 2 days ago. Apparently they can’t tell me. So I re sent it. That tell me it can take between 2-5 days to scan this to my file.This process started towards the end of September. I am no further forward on knowing the result of my application on an 8 percent loan to value. Yes 8 per cent.I was also advised that The Coventry do not provide updates despite my request for them so I call every week and get no where.I’m sad to write this but your customer service is less than 1 Star.I despair.  I’ve paid for this service but there is no service. Just tick boxes. Everyone in the call centre just keeps saying sorry.

reviews.title: Very helpful customer service, highly reccomend
reviews.body: Nik Forrester at the Southam Branch was incredibly helpful. She was extremely knowledgeable and informative on what I needed to be done. She then helped me complete the jobs. Very helpful, highly recommend.

reviews.title: Visits to the Sheffield branch
reviews.body: I have been to the Sheffield branch on a few visits to sort out some help with accounts.ALL The staff at this branch are a credit to Coventry building society, Antony dealt with ALL our issues with  sympathy and professionalism at our time of loss.10/10

reviews.title: Do Not Open an ISA with these…
reviews.body: Do Not Open an ISA with these blackmailerYou should be aware that if you open a fixed ISA with them they automaticlaly renew it as anotehr fixed term isa, In my case 2 years. Their fixed rate isa are appalling.You cannot sit on the ISA waiting for a better rate to come and then transfer the ISA.Their terms and conditions are highly uncompetitive as they lock you in. When you opoen an ISA their form does not highlight this lock-in,  in my case for 2 years.  Beware you think you are opening a 2 year ISA you are opening efectively a  4 year ISA. If you need to access the money you thought you would have access to after the 2 years you they charge you a HUGE penalty

reviews.title: Nina is always friendly.
reviews.body: Nina is always friendly and professional. During todays appointment she explained all of our options regarding ISAs clearly and answered all of our questions knowledgeably allowing us to make fully informed decisions about the products we were choosing.

reviews.title: Coventry have been brillaint
reviews.body: Coventry have been brillaint, both with our families mortgage and various savings products.Customer support has been second to none, personal and just great service.I wouldn't hesitate in recommending them to others.

reviews.title: Very pleased with the service.
reviews.body: I had a very polite and well spoken lady help me on the phone a couple of times lately, wish I could remember her name! I spoke to her twice on 28/10 and she called me with information today, 30/10 at 11.04am. She was very professional and put my mind at ease during a difficult period for me, so I am very grateful for her help and understanding. I'd like to think she'd get some kind of feedback from this review! Thanks again!

reviews.title: The lady who served me was very…
reviews.body: The lady who served me was very knowledgeable very professional very very well mannered and talked me through everything very helpful. It was absolutely excellent service and I went through what I needed for me and it was all done professionally. I couldn’t fault such fantastic service and this why I stay at this building society for 40 years .

reviews.title: Great Experience
reviews.body: Friendly and took time to explain all the options. Made a great cup of tea as well! Andrea was very knowledgeable and competent.

reviews.title: Coventry Building Society Elite Customer Service!
reviews.body: Just spoke to Coventry Building Society for an annual tax statement. I need the same for other high street banks. I must say this service was absolutely excellent. No waiting on the phone. Fantastic security. Polite lady (wish I remembered her name), and a clear outcome and action. Wish you hadn’t reduced the interest Coventry BS, because this service was elite!! Thank you. Steve Preston.

reviews.title: Outdated Building Society
reviews.body: Outdated, it's an okay BS if you like dealing with physical post and have a branch nearby, anything else (like online access etc.) is very outdated and near non-existent. They also have a tendency to lie, they told me transferring out my ISA would be impossible unless I stayed with them and did the postal verification, which I struggled to do because of their odd requirements, as it turned out you can switch your ISA if you have a ISA provider who's willing to fight for you, needless to say, I regret my 1 year of holding my account there.

reviews.title: Huge fee and awful communication
reviews.body: They didn't have an app for half the time I was with them. So everything they send you takes ages to arrive in the post. They also changed me a fee of half a years worth of interest on my 2 year term with them because I wanted to take my money out when they automatically matured me. I will never bank with them again.

reviews.title: Totally inflexible.
reviews.body: All family members have accounts with Coventry Building Society.  My eldest son was turning 18, so his account matured.  All of us went into branch on his 18th birthday with his driving licence and a letterhead with his name and address on from his bank.  It turns out this wasn't sufficient for the staff. The manager showed no interest and the staff member kept going to her to ask for advice but the manager never came over to us.  We have since learned from speaking to other staff that the branch manager could've used her discretion to resolve this but chose not to. Instead we were sent away and asked to bring in his passport, which has exactly the same information on as his driving licence!  We told the staff that we live an hour away so it's not a quick trip home and back.   All of this interaction was on the shop floor within earshot of other customers and it made us feel like naughty schoolchildren.

reviews.title: This company is a joke since the…
reviews.body: This company is a joke since the beginning of may we have been trying to take out equity as my husband and myself are really struggling to pay off depts because of ill health,we was told it would be sorted in a few weeks? Nearly six months later still nothing which has resulted in financial and emotional ruin the staff on the phone are friendly  but its just been so prolonged it’s making our mental health much much  worse

reviews.title: Friendly Efficient Service
reviews.body: Aways a great friendly service at the Milton Keynes branch. We have been served by Oscar on a couple of occasions now and this  time we had a query regarding a new account we were considering opening.  Once Oscar explained the account we were happy to go ahead with opening the account which Oscar did along with another couple of  ISA accounts.  He was very efficient and provided a first class service.   It is such a pleasant change to be able to go into a financial institution and actually speak to someone who understands his customer.  Please don’t close ay branches.

reviews.title: Absolutely useless telephone banking
reviews.body: Absolutely useless telephone banking, locks me out constantly. I am not putting anything else into this company.

reviews.title: I wanted to change my surname from my…
reviews.body: I wanted to change my surname from my husband's name to my maiden name. I didn't want any change to my marriage. So I went into Cirencester branch to do this and the staff insisted this was impossible without a deed poll from a solicitor for 'legal reasons' the staff assured me. I complained as I know this isn't true, it said so on their own website. The manager rang me back the next day and repeated the above, so I complained to Head Office who agree with me and gave £100 for my trouble. What I particularly dislike is being told 'for legal reasons...' when it clearly was untrue. I got a better rate saving elsewhere too. Rubbish customer service but I liked the £100.UPDATE: I phoned the number below written by Kathryn and got an options menu, none of these seemed relevant to me, so I pressed savings to speak to someone but she didn't have any idea what I was talking about, so I was transferred to someone  else who also didn't know what I was talking about but took details and said she'd pass the information to her manager, now my account is closed. Strange to ask me to ring a number then for that team not to know what I was ringing about.

reviews.title: Nottingham branch, "computer sez no"
reviews.body: Worst customer service at the Nottingham city centre branch.My son turned 18 and on his birthday wanted to access his now matured child's ISA.So as a family of four we made a 50 mile  round trip to our nearest branch.Even though the four of us all have accounts and all of us had photo ID and proof of address.  This was not good enough for the staff at Nottingham to let my son access his savings.  To add insult to injury they transferred his money into a low paying ISA of their choice and would not let us change this.This was all because their proof requires utility bills, council tax bills and bank statements. At 18 our son does not have his own house (suprise, suprise) and his bank account is paperless, at the banks behest. He provided photo ID and all the building societies letters address to him at his home address, plus letters from his bank with his home address.But this is a "computer sez no" building society and the staff were having none of it.Since making a formal complaint it now appears matters can be resolved over the phone.  Quite how this is possible when they flatly refused in person remains to be seen. Why four staff members could not manage it requires a full explanation.Update: 15.10.25 Still no access to this account complaint still unresolved.  Closing four family members accounts with this building society they do not deserve our business.Update;17.10.25 Complaint finally concluded. No access to the account. We are indeed naughty schoolchildren who need to be taught a lesson in how to do our homework, common sense has no place in banking.. How this building society stays in business is beyond me.

reviews.title: Hopeless online experience
reviews.body: Nice people, good products but utterly hopeless online experience - 90 minutes of"unable to display the page you're looking for.But well done the Coventry team in their efforts to resolve the problem.

reviews.title: Very rigid processes
reviews.body: I dealt with Coventry when a close relative recently passed, and whilst they were perfectly pleasant - they were very rigid & strict with their processes and procedures, in a way that no other organisation I dealt with, were. Several other banks, whilst following process, showed a degree of flexibility with a complex case - but not so Coventry.Myself and the joint executor followed their complaints process all the way to the Ombudsman, and now refuse to have any further dealings with them - knowing what we now know about some of their processes.

reviews.title: Tammy Green
reviews.body: Tammy Green was knowledgeable, helpful and very patient with a man in his eighties. Coventry BS pay good interest rates, and is always  accessible..

reviews.title: Warwickshire Shopping Park - Mandy Wing
reviews.body: Very helpful and friendly

reviews.title: Helpful and supportive.
reviews.body: I don’t post reviews very often but I have had a fantastic experience with Coventry BS today and I am so impressed by how helpful and supportive they were. I have only been with them for 3 years but I will keep my mortgage with them because customer service like I received today is priceless and it’s something that you see less of these days. I spoke to a lovely mortgage advisor and she put me through to the collection side of things and the lady there was just incredible. I just wish I had taken her name so I could have emailed and named her personally. Thank you so much CBS I award you 10 out of 10!!

reviews.title: Telephone contact impossible on a…
reviews.body: Telephone contact impossible on a Sunday.Not good enough.

reviews.title: Very helpful and knowledgable.
reviews.body: Very helpful and knowledgable.Thank you

reviews.title: Disappointed to leave — but values must be backed by service
reviews.body: I appreciated Coventry Building Society’s approach for a long time. Their savings products were clear, and I felt they offered a thoughtful alternative to high-street banking. But after a recent experience with a group company, Co-op Bank, now under Coventry’s ownership, I’ve had to close all my accounts.My decision wasn’t taken lightly. I value ethical banking and had hoped this group would reflect those principles in practice. Unfortunately, the service I received from Co-op Bank fell short, and the lack of meaningful engagement with my concerns made it impossible to continue trusting the wider group.Ethical branding must be matched by ethical service, responsive, transparent, and accountable. I hope Coventry reflects on how group decisions and customer experience are connected. I’ve moved my finances to providers who demonstrate care not just in their messaging, but in how they treat people.

reviews.title: Thank you Milton Keynes
reviews.body: Today I visited Milton Keynes branch to undertake a number of transactions and changes to accounts for my mother and myself. Despite it being the end of the day Emma was truely professional and so empathetic over what I was trying to do providing much help , sharing the benefit of her knowledge and extremely understanding. She was so kind and patient and despite being near to the branch closing time she continued to complete my requests and not make me feel hurried at all. Kelly was so kind and helped with another gentleman so as Emma could help me. A real team and such lovely people.I have been with this branch for 40 years and when I walk in they always make me feel welcome. They are a credit to the CBS.

reviews.title: Zoe and Charlie were behind the service counters
reviews.body: Zoe and Charlie were behind the service glass partitioned service counter. They were absolutely amazing, extremely sufficient, informed and helpful doing it so quickly and kindly I hardly noticed the time. It took me 2 minutes to get everything done where speaking the honest truth in my experience in other banks it would possibly have taken 30 minutes or more

reviews.title: The Coventry was less than helpful.
reviews.body: If you rang the Coventry Building Society would you expect to get the advice you needed - would you be told whether an interest was fixed or variable. Not if you wanted to open an account online. I ended up with a variable rate Isa when I had wanted a fixed rate ISA. The response to my complaint that advisers did not tell me the account paid a variable rate came from Jonny Gardner, complaints specialist. He wrote: "As this account was opened via Our Online Services, I wouldn't be expecting the adviser to be confirming details on the account unless asked."This novel approach to customer care was confirmed by the Coventry to the financial ombudsman. In answering my complaint, the Coventry told the ombudsman:" "I wouldn't have expected its agents to explain to her (that the Isa paid a variable rate) as she had opened up the Isa online".The ombudsman ruled that the Coventry had not acted unfairly - he rarely finds for complainants - and he took more than six months to come to that decision. He noted that I had spoken to two advisers and neither had told me the Isa paid a variable rate. He also said:"It would have been more helpful if the name of the Isa had made it clear it was a variable rate."The account I opened paid 4.8% in October last year. It now pays 3.6%.If the Coventry is actually sorry about what happened, they could compensate me for the financial loss as a result of not getting the advice that the account paid a variable rate.

reviews.title: Saade was quick and helpful
reviews.body: Saade was quick, helpful and very efficient. Thank you!

reviews.title: Teo at the Coventry Arena branch was…
reviews.body: Teo at the Coventry Arena branch was exceptional very friendly and helpful helping my parents to review their accounts. He’s an asset to the company so patient and attentive really appreciate your support thank you Teo deserves a recognition.

reviews.title: Superb service!
reviews.body: Superb service, knowledge and Savings Accounts! I have not been into a Branch, as there are none near me. The on-line System is clearly explained,  with different Accounts and every member of Staff I have spoken with on the phone is friendly,  cheery, extremely knowledgeable and happy to answer any questions I have. They send e-mails only when necessary,  so they don't pester you with useless information. I can't fault their Service.

reviews.title: Unhappy
reviews.body: Countless times I have tried to get into my savings account countless time they send me a timed code countless times it arrives to late if and when I get into my account I shall be closing it

reviews.title: Southam Branch
reviews.body: Nikki and the team at Southam branch have always been so supportive and helpful. Really cannot fault them. Nikki always advises what is best for you and understands your personal situation. All the staff there are amazing!

reviews.title: Refusal to look under some tarpaulin
reviews.body: Undervalued property. Did not take into account location. Refused to give mortgage on a thatch property due to there being tarpaulin on roof which left a portion obstructed from view.Refused to view again with tarpaulin removed. This has left us now loosing out on purchasing our dream property, simply due to the laziness and uncompassionate nature of this group.

reviews.title: Dealing with a brick wall
reviews.body: I wanted to transfer an ISA to another provider. The customer “services” advisor I spoke to refused to even discuss my account, claiming that I had failed to answer the verification questions correctly. There were 4:  full name, d.o.b., address. The 4th was whether the ISA was in a joint name and for a minute I could not remember whether my husband and I shared it or not. That was it. I had failed and she was ‘not allowed’ to tell me why. No money would be released because I had not answered correctly. If this is how staff are trained it certainly is not to benefit the customer. It was like banging my head on a brick wall!  I refused to give up and phoned again, getting a different advisor. She actually understood what I wanted, did not make me feel like a criminal and agreed to release my own money. I am glad to leave Coventry Building Society.

reviews.title: Good telephone service.
reviews.body: The Coventry phone number is usually answered promptly and this time I had my cash ISA switched from a Coventry ISA with a lower interest rate to a Coventry ISA with a higher rate. It pays to keep up to date, as you are not informed when an account with similar conditions has a better rate.

reviews.title: Snail mail beaurocratic nightmare
reviews.body: Coventry Building Society’s business model seems to rely on making it as painful as possible for customers to access their own money.Their so called “security” systems are unnecessarily convoluted, almost designed to lock you out. Once that happens, the real nightmare begins: staff give contradictory, often outright wrong, instructions. I was told to send my passport and driving licence to one email address, only to later find out it was incorrect. Another adviser confidently gave me yet another email address, which turned out to be wrong too. When I raised the seriousness of this mishandling of sensitive data and said I would report it to the ICO, the adviser hung up on me.At my wits’ end, I tried the Nottingham branch, two hours’ drive away. The person on the phone sounded irritated, as if my call was an inconvenience, and openly admitted he did not know what to do, cutting me off because “there was a queue of people.”This is not a one off mistake; it feels systemic. Coventry lure you in with attractive introductory rates, which quietly collapse to near zero after the first year. When you then try to move your ISA, you will find yourself trapped in a bureaucratic maze. I have been trying for a year now, and I still cannot access or transfer my own savings.My advice: steer clear of Coventry Building Society. The hassle, the incompetence, and the risks to your data security are simply not worth it.

reviews.title: We came to the Leicester branch and…
reviews.body: We came to the Leicester branch and Felix looked after our banking affairs. He was absolutely professional and knowledgeable and very helpful! Felix is a credit to the company and thank him very much for all his support today!

reviews.title: Milton Keynes for excellent service and advice.
reviews.body: Visited the Milton Keynes branch and was very satisfied with the attention and advice given. Comfortable surroundings and confidential when needed to be. Well done to our advisor.

reviews.title: Big cut in savings rate
reviews.body: CBS say the Bank of England reduced interest rates by 0.25% so they are reducing the interest rates on savings, but not by 0.25% but by 0.3%.  This is not doing 'what's right for our members', but what is right for their profits.

reviews.title: Yet again a poor service
reviews.body: Yet again, the online service is not in service. I get this message every time I log inWhy is your IT so rubbish?The app is not much better. They sent me an email stating that I can close my account because they have just dropped the interest rate, and I won't pay the normal penalty. However, they then want almost £9 to close it because I am in breach of their rules.I thought this business would have learnt after my last complaint, but they seem not to have got the message.

reviews.title: Got the job done
reviews.body: Oscar, at the Milton Keynes Branch, did his task, of changing our existing savings to another new account, very efficiently.It is a shame that it seems to be a long-winded process in order to achieve the required end result but that is 'red-tape' for you. Better to go thru all of the security processes rather than end up with the wrong result.

reviews.title: Contacted Coventry Building Society by…
reviews.body: Contacted Coventry Building Society by phone.Excellent help and Information received to open a savings Account.Patient knowledgable advisor that I could easily understand to help me with mobile banking. Great for older people who need help with banking.

reviews.title: No online banking
reviews.body: Normally very happy with CBS but this is the third day when online banking is not available - not possible to log in. No email and no apparent apology on the website.Update - I contacted CBS again (not quite sure what 'reaching out is) the outage is fixed  - I was guided to try another browser, which fortunately worked.

reviews.title: Better than all the rest .
reviews.body: Better than all the rest .Other companies should look to Coventry to see how everything should be done .The  staff are always courteous , knowledgable and go the extra mile .On line banking is so easy to use .A cracking Building Society , streets ahead of the others  .

reviews.title: Complaint handling
reviews.body: Pleased that CBS took my complaint seriously and dealt with the matters appropriately.  The complaint handler (Jonny Gardner) kept me informed of progress and proactively contacted me through to resolution.  Thank you.

reviews.title: Top Marks Milton Keynes
reviews.body: I visited Milton Keynes branch today as I had received a letter I did not understand.After spending sometime with Oscar and he making a phone call, the letter was understood.A new account was opened and funds transferred and by the time I was home it showed in my app.

reviews.title: CBS extended the fixed term of my bond without explicit authorisation
reviews.body: I took out a 12 month Fixed Bond last year. It matured at the end of December. CBS wrote to me asking me what I wanted to do with it (unfortunately this coincided with the suicide of one of my relatives) and I assumed it would be put in an account earning low interest - similar to what happens elsewhere. I was able to take some money out of it in the 3rd week of January but hadn't realised their default is to roll it over for another 12 months. I now can't access the remaining money until 31/12/25.Update 12/08I raised a complaint about this on 02/08 and although I spoke to several CBS staff I was told nothing could be done. However, it was subsequently raised to the Senior Complaints Team. A professional and empathetic lady called Paige helped resolve the issue to my satisfaction. So much so that I have now taken out a further CBS investment with the £ I  was able to withdraw from the Fixed Bond.

reviews.title: Milton Keynes CBS visit.
reviews.body: Oscar at the Milton Keynes Branch made transferring my ISA very easy. The whole team were friendly, professional and welcoming. A great experience for my first visit to one of your branches.

reviews.title: New junior ISA accounts set up for 2…
reviews.body: New junior ISA accounts set up for 2 children in 45 minutes today. Most helpful, friendly staff. A credit to this company. Thank you for your support and assistance.

reviews.title: We needed to open a joint account…
reviews.body: We needed to open a joint account quickly. We saw one advertised online, which we applied for, but were nervous about giving details applying online. The next day we popped into our local branch and they took us effortlessly through the whole process, even though we had already started the process online. Everything was explained and we got our account number immediately. Very happy! Everyone in brach was friendly and helpful, we even got a cup of coffee. The lady who opened the account for us had great knowledge and could answer all our questions. A great all around experience.

reviews.title: Having forgotten all my login details!
reviews.body: Having forgotten all my login details!, I called savings customer services, the lady was extremely understanding, and helpful.She gave me options to reset my account, explaining them very clearly, which I followed with success.Now very relieved!, I am most grateful for her help many thanks!!

reviews.title: Amazingly unable to put the customer first
reviews.body: I have an easy access account with the Coventry building society which I opened online in January 2025. The account pays interest monthly to my holding account. a current account with HSBC. On 11 July 2025 I accessed my online account and asked to transfer a sum of money to my holding account. The request was declined with the message that the names on each account did not match. Even though the interest transfer worked every month.For the CBS I had used my middle and surname but on the HSBC account I had used my First, middle and surname. I contacted CBS and was informed that the only way to withdraw money from the account was to change my account name.To do this I would have to fill in a paper form and send two original forms of identity by post. I expressed concern about sending original documents through in my experience the unsafe postal system. I was instructed that I should then copy the documents and have them certified by a "professional person" and send these documents with the form by post to CBS. I felt it unnecessary to disturb, for example, my GP to do this and contacted CBS to see if there was an alternative.A representative spoke to her manager who then informed her that she would accept a scanned copy of my passport and driving licence along with a photograph of me displaying both documents. The managers direct email address was supplied to me, and I sent through the documents as requested. On Friday 17 July I called CBS to follow up as daily access to the account still produced a declined transfer request. I was told the manger would action the change later that day. On 21 July I called CBS again as there was still no progress, but I did receive a voicemail from the representative who had liaised with the manager asking me to call to get an explanation. On 22 July I called CBS again and was informed that CBS would only accept a request by post by change of name form and certified copies of acceptable documentation.I am based in Edinburgh. CBS has no branches in Edinburgh, but it took over the Co-op Bank in January 2025 so In response I offered to go to the Co-op Bank in George Street Edinburgh to ratify my documents, but I was informed this was not possible as the organisations are not yet fully merged.The need for me to access the money on 11 July was critical to a major purchase. To me there was abundant evidence available to CBS to enable a small edit function and adjust the name on my account. As part of their customer service I had to do all the work to complete a form, arrange appointment to speak to a GP, get copies of my appropriate documents and get a certified copy then post them through an unreliable service and wait an unspecified time until they could be convinced to make the small alteration to my account name.I believe that the responses by CBS are examples of poor customer service and represent outdated practices and systems. I am unsure how to get my money back from CBS but I will continue to find a way. I would advise people to avoid dealing with CBS in particular if you live in an area without access to a local branch.

reviews.title: Pleasureable experience meeting Oscar…
reviews.body: I had the pleasure of meeting Oscar yesterday in the Milton Keynes branch as I wanted to transfer a matured ISA from another provider.  He was extremely helpful, knowledgeable and patient making the experience easy :)

reviews.title: Phone app hasn't worked for months
reviews.body: Phone app hasn't worked for months, so will be moving money somewhere else as access is too difficult.

reviews.title: Excellent customer service
reviews.body: We had the pleasure of meeting Emma at the Milton Keynes branch a few days ago.Emma was extremely helpful and very knowledgeable about the products we were interested in.Emma was also extremely efficient with providing all documentation and made the whole process so easy. Thank you Emma!

reviews.title: Pragmatic resolution to my problem
reviews.body: Many thanks to the young lady that I spoke to at about 13:30 this afternoon (12/7/25).With the support of her manager, they managed to resolve a situation which was the result of Sky "discontinuing" my telephone number.They found a pragmatic work-around until I receive the reset telephone security details.

reviews.title: Managing accounts
reviews.body: Went to CBS in leamington spa today to deal with an old account and set up a new account and Simon was amazing! He gave me all the information I needed and was very thorough, very pleased.

reviews.title: Mortgage Withdrawal, updated.
reviews.body: Further to my review on July 3rd 2025, I was asked by Coventry Building Society for further information. I gave them all the information they requested. Surprise, surprise, I have heard nothing back!!!!

reviews.title: Excellent customer service today from Oscar
reviews.body: Excellent customer service today from Oscar who helped us set up our account explaining everything in detail. Oscar also helped us set up our in-line banking! Thanks for a great service

reviews.title: really great advice
reviews.body: really great advice, nice and simple to complete the transaction and all in a timely manner

reviews.title: Does anyone actually get it right these days?
reviews.body: Don't worry Amber, I've moved on to the Newcastle. They know what they are doing...Tried to open a savings account this afternoon online. Got as far as asking for my nominated bank details, but the field in the online form does not cater for a double barrel name so rejected... What is the point? And how many potential customers have you lost under the same circumstances who have just simply moved on to the next building society?UPDATE SINCE ORIGINAL POST.Spoke to a customer advisor online who suggested I ring their general inquiries 0800 number for further advice. I explain the problem and I'm asked if I have another bank account that I can put forward as an alternative. What difference is that going to make? as I don't change my name on a weekly basis. The advisor then suggests she speak to their technical team who suggested I contact my bank to establish what input is accepted their end for verification? TOTALLY UNBELIEVABLE! So because they cannot be asked to increase the field input by at least three characters for those of us who have long names, the Customer has to jump through hoops to actually open an account. Tell you what Coventry BS, I currently have savings in a competitor's BS which matures in September and they have offered me a loyalty bonus saver account if I stay with them. So they have my loyalty and it will be a lot less hassle. Don't suggest I ring an 0800 number because your advisors use the preferred approach these days... Sweep it under the rug and hope it goes away.

reviews.title: Excellent service from Andrea in the…
reviews.body: Excellent service from Andrea in the Milton Keynes branch who has supported getting me back online after being locked out for a few years! Could never work out the letters that were sent to me, new online journey has got me back on in the space of about 30 mins! Thank you

reviews.title: Excellent service
reviews.body: Excellent service from the friendly and knowledgeable staff at the Chipping Sodbury branch.

reviews.title: Uphill grind for mortgages
reviews.body: Firstly for balance, coventry have offered us an OK mortgage rate several years in a row and remortgages are processed quickly.After that things get rocky. You need to ring up about pretty much anything you can imagine.Last two times I rang up, i spoke to someone who accused me of being mis sold a mortgage just for asking a basic question, before that I rang to overpay and spoke to someone who had never processed an overpayment before.Online it says overpayments across multiple mortgages will be distributed evenly but I have found them to be randomly allocated in a problematic fashion.Coventry are a lot of hassle for the sake of a reasonable rate.

reviews.title: VERY IMPRESSED WITH THE COVENTRY
reviews.body: Complained about 5 days ago about an agent I spoke with. They replied asking for more info.I gave it.They have rung me twice and agreed with what I had said after listening to the recording.I'm very, very impressed with the way this complaint has been dealt with.!00% to the Coventry.

reviews.title: My son had a really bad experience in…
reviews.body: My son had a really bad experience in the last few days with Cov Building Society similar to some of the more recent reviews. I notice that the review replies from  CBS all follow the same format Hello  thanks for your review. We're sorry to hear about your experience. We've reached out for some more information so we can look into this for you.  One reply even ended with cheers  from the CBS customer service like they are in a bar or something.CBS have had just under 4000 complaints logged against them(information from their own web site). The level of customer service from CBS is appalling its clear the management have.nt got a clue. Ooh except how to reach out whatever that means.I have been a customer for  over 20 years but will be closing my account because of how they treated my son who also closed his account. 4000 complaints thats both disgraceful and  embarrassing they should be ashamed that a once really good building society has sunk to such low depths.

reviews.title: No Access
reviews.body: I cannot access my account online. I've called about this several times. They've 'refreshed' things on their side and even got me to create a new profile with different login details, password, etc - and I still get the same message:'If you've just registered for Online Services it will take a few minutes for your account(s) to show, please log off and try again in a few minutes.'I could still use the account by phone but in 2025 this situation seems ridiculous. Very frustrated as the interest rate was pretty decent in the current climate. I'll be placing my money elsewhere.

reviews.title: My experience with Coventry Building…
reviews.body: My experience with Coventry Building Society’s Business Development Team has been disappointing.Service Quality: Communication has been inconsistent, with frequent delays in responses to inquiries. When replies do arrive, they often lack clarity or fail to address the issue properly, leading to frustration and wasted time.Product Offerings: The financial products and services offered did not meet expectations. Some options lacked flexibility, and key details about terms and conditions were not communicated effectively. Compared to other institutions, the variety and competitiveness of their offerings fell short.Customer Support: The level of support has been inadequate. Attempts to resolve issues were met with either long wait times or unhelpful responses. The lack of proactive assistance made it difficult to get meaningful resolutions to concerns, affecting overall confidence in their service.Overall, Coventry Building Society’s Business Development Team needs significant improvements in responsiveness, transparency, and customer care.

reviews.title: Living in the 1980's...
reviews.body: This company don't use ANY online communication or firm filing or signature use etc etc  so as a result,  we have ended up with a mortgage extension that we didn't actually agree to when we 1st spoke to their adviser!! (Of course we signed all the forms......). I cannot recommend them at all!!!!UPDATE- just remortgage with Leeds BS and has taken 10 days!!  And I didn't even have an existing mortgage with them!! CLEAR EVIDENCE OF COVENTRY BS INEPTITUDE..

reviews.title: Taidi Was so helpful today
reviews.body: Taidi Was so helpful today on the phone. Would it be possible to clone her and send a copy to HSBC. She was empathetic, very clear, concise and competent. Who ever trained her deserves a pat on the back. A joy to talk to. She explained everything to me and checked my understanding. She must be employee of the month every month. She is simply the best.
